title: Inside Edge: Early Case Intelligence - Leveraging Technology & Gen AI
content:
## Inside Edge: Early Case Intelligence - Leveraging Technology & Gen AI
McCarthy Tétrault is pleased to invite you to our fourth session of Inside Edge series, focused on Early Case Intelligence and how in-house legal teams can leverage technology and generative AI to strengthen dispute strategy from the outset.
Please join us for a fireside chat with Susan Wortzman , Partner, Litigation and President of McCarthy Tétrault's MT>3 Division, and, Lyndsey Delamont , Partner, Litigation, as they discuss best practices and practical processes to support the disputes lifecycle from day one.
Topics will include:
- How early case intelligence informs the strategy and risk assessment for litigation, investigations, and regulatory matters.
- Leveraging technology and Gen AI to accelerate insight and decision-making.
- Controlling costs and improving predictability in complex disputes.
- Building defensible, repeatable processes from the outset of a matter.
- Aligning legal strategy with business objectives.
In an environment where data volumes are growing and timelines are tightening, early insight can materially influence exposure, settlement posture, and overall dispute management. This session is designed specifically for in-house counsel seeking practical, forward-looking approaches to dispute readiness and resolution. For questions about this event, please contact calgaryevents@mccarthy.ca .
- Susan Wortzman Partner People.Offices.Singular Toronto
People.Offices.Singular Toronto
- Lyndsey Delamont Partner People.Offices.Singular Calgary
